acceptance_criteria.text: Agent Blueprint supervised outreach uses real transitional prospectingleads from sourcing through shortlist, drafts, approvals, and LocalOS queue handoff without dispatcher start.
proof: lead_shortlist is derived from the prior lead_source_plan artifact when lead_ids are not supplied
record_outcomes derives draft_ids from the message_drafts artifact
smoke fixture now starts from new/unprocessed prospectingleads and runs sourcing filters
gaps: Live authenticated smoke is reserved for deploy verification because it writes and cleans test fixture rows.

known_gaps: Full live smoke requires controlled production fixture creation and cleanup.
